# Tax Consultant / Financial Services — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P2-tax-consultant-financial-services
**Vertical slug:** tax-consultant
**Research date:** 2026-04-25
**Agent:** replit-agent-2026-04-25-session-C

## 1. Nigerian Market Context
Nigerian tax consultancy is a growing professional services market driven by FIRS (Federal Inland Revenue Service) increasingly digitalising tax administration (TaxPro Max system), SME compliance obligations (VAT, CIT, PAYE, WHT, SDL), and SMEDAN research showing 70% of Nigerian SMEs are non-compliant with at least one tax obligation. Target clients: SME owners, startups, professional firms, NGOs. Leading trust signal: FIRS Tax Agent Certificate (`firsTaxAgentCert`) — the most credible credential. ICAN fellowship (Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria) and ANAN (Association of National Accountants) are secondary. Average engagement fees: bookkeeping ₦20,000–₦80,000/month; VAT filing ₦15,000–₦50,000/filing; tax audit defense ₦200,000–₦1,500,000/engagement.

## 2. Trust Signals
- FIRS Tax Agent Certificate (`firsTaxAgentCert`) — MANDATORY to display
- ICAN fellowship number (FCA/ACA)
- ANAN membership (where applicable)
- CAC RC number (practice registration)
- Years of practice
- Notable client sectors handled (manufacturing, FMCG, fintech, NGO)
- "Free initial consultation" — common lead generation CTA
- Testimonials from Nigerian business owners

## 3. Key CTAs
- Primary: "Book a Free Consultation" (WhatsApp or phone)
- Secondary: "View Our Services"
- CRITICAL: No automated tax advice from template — website is discovery/lead gen only

## 4. Tax Services Nigerian Businesses Need
- Company income tax (CIT) filing
- VAT registration and returns
- PAYE remittance management
- Withholding Tax (WHT) compliance
- Transfer pricing documentation
- Tax health check / audit defense
- Business registration (CAC + FIRS TIN)

## 5. Website Structure
- Home: hero (professional trust) + FIRS badge + services summary + free consultation CTA
- About: qualifications, ICAN membership, years of practice, client sectors
- Services: all tax and financial service offerings with fee ranges in NGN
- Contact: WhatsApp + phone + office address

## 6. Platform Invariants
- T4: all fees in kobo integers
- P13: no client TIN or tax liability data in template (tax privilege protection)
- P2: NGN fees, FIRS/ICAN trust signals, Nigerian tax types
- CSS namespace: .tc-
